title: rhododendron sanguineum subsp. roseotinctum
intro: Rhododendron sanguineum subsp. roseotinctum, also known as the 'Lilac-flowered Sanguine Rhododendron', is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron sanguineum subsp. roseotinctum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments for various health purposes.
